title: ScrollArea with permanently visible thumb and padding for content Columns
summary: Adds a `permanentScrollbar` prop to the ScrollArea component in playground-ui. When enabled, the scrollbar thumb is always visible (via forceMount) and content gets right-padding to prevent overlap. Introduces a new `useHasOverflow` hook that uses ResizeObserver to detect overflow. Refactors ColumnContent and ItemListItemsScroller to use ScrollArea with the new prop, removing old manual overflow-handling code (including commented-out code). Also includes a Storybook story and minor scrollbar styling tweaks (width, thumb color).
maintainerNotes: This is a draft PR from a maintainer. CI has 2 failures (E2E Tests and Observability Package Tests) — the Observability failure is likely unrelated to these UI changes, but the E2E failure may be relevant since this modifies playground-ui components. No human reviews yet, only CodeRabbit automated review with 3 actionable comments. The PR has a changeset and description with screenshots/video. No unit tests added but this is a UI/styling change. The checklist items are unchecked. PR has been idle for 8 days since creation — author may still be iterating.
